title: Germany's Foreign Minister (during Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar's visit to Germany): Germany is committed to Israel's security - a steadfast commitment that is not subject to change. Let it always...
body:
Germany's Foreign Minister (during Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar's visit to Germany): 

Germany is committed to Israel's security - a steadfast commitment that is not subject to change.

Let it always be clear: we will not allow any threat to the very existence of the State of Israel.

This is a fundamental principle of Germany's policy.

extra.original_body:
שר החוץ הגרמני (במהלך ביקורו של שר החוץ גדעון סער בגרמניה): 

גרמניה מחויבת לביטחונה של ישראל - מחויבות איתנה שאינה נתונה לשינוי.

שיהיה ברור תמיד: לא נאפשר כל איום על עצם קיומה של מדינת ישראל.

זהו עקרון יסוד במדיניותה של גרמניה.

title: Germany's Chancellor Merz continues to demand: Iran must come to the negotiating table. It must stop playing for time. It must no longer take the region and the entire world hostage. Its military n...
body:
Germany's Chancellor Merz continues to demand:

Iran must come to the negotiating table.

It must stop playing for time.

It must no longer take the region and the entire world hostage.

Its military nuclear program must be ended completely and forever, and there must be no further strikes against Israel and our partners in the region.

title: Iran has launched a new system regulating vessel passage through the Strait of Hormuz, according to state TV. Ships must first notify Iranian authorities, then receive an electronic message outlini...
body:
Iran has launched a new system regulating vessel passage through the Strait of Hormuz, according to state TV.

Ships must first notify Iranian authorities, then receive an electronic message outlining navigation rules. After accepting these terms, they are granted a transit permit.

Permits will be issued by a newly established government body.

Status-6 (War & Military News)
The United States has approved the sale of JDAM-ER guidance kits and related equipment to Ukraine for the estimated total cost of $373.6 million.

The request of the Ukrainian government includes 332 KMU-556 JDAM tail kits (for 2000 pound bomb) and 1,200 KMU-572 JDAM tail kits (for 500 pound bomb).

body:
Visioner
RT @NSTRIKE1231: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio:
“The operation is over — ‘Epic Fury’. We have completed this phase.
We are now transitioning to Project ‘Freedom’ — the escorting of vessels through the Strait of Hormuz.
The negotiation process must cover not only the issue of uranium enrichment, but also the fate of the material that is currently buried deep underground — material they could still access if they ever choose to bring it out.
This question must be resolved, and it will be part of the discussions in the negotiations.”

Video is generated by grok AI

title: 🇮🇷🇦🇪🇺🇸| Iran’s Foreign Ministry condemns Abu Dhabi for cooperating with US/Israel against Iran, especially by hosting military bases and equipment. The MFA now also officially rejects UAE claims th...
body:
🇮🇷🇦🇪🇺🇸| Iran’s Foreign Ministry condemns Abu Dhabi for cooperating with US/Israel against Iran, especially by hosting military bases and equipment.

The MFA now also officially rejects UAE claims that Iran launched missiles or drones at the Emirates, saying Iran’s actions are only aimed at repelling US aggression.

Tehran warns that continued military/logistical cooperation against Iran is unacceptable and says Iran will take any necessary measures to defend its national security.

title: The chairman of the American-Arab Anti-Discrimination Committee (ADC) told Middle East Eye that the board will not resign amid growing calls for an overhaul, because doing so would be based on "a c...
body:
The chairman of the American-Arab Anti-Discrimination Committee (ADC) told Middle East Eye that the board will not resign amid growing calls for an overhaul, because doing so would be based on "a campaign of misleading statements circulating on social media".

He added that it "would be a disservice to the organization's mission at this critical time".

The nearly 80-year-old Safa Rifka, an infertility and reproductive endocrinologist by trade, responded to questions from MEE through email on Saturday, via the public relations firm Poston Communications.

✍️ Yasmine El-Sabawi in Washington

🔗 https://www.middleeasteye.net/news/adc-board-refuses-resignation

body:
🤡 ‘There’s no oil blockade on Cuba’ — Rubio does a 180 on Trump’s Cuba blockade

Earlier, Trump proudly bragged that the island had “no oil,” “no money,” and “no anything” under the US embargo.

🚫 For months, the Epstein regime has prevented deliveries of critical supplies to Cuba — pressuring shipments, threatening supply routes, and calling economic collapse a strategy.

🚢🇷🇺 Remarkable how sharply the rhetoric changed after a Russian oil tanker reached Cuba in late March.

title: This text was successfully translated into English by the mock engine.
body: This text was successfully translated into English by the mock engine.

extra.original_body:
مارکو روبیو اعلام کرد واشنگتن در تلاش است مشخص کند جمهوری اسلامی بر سر چه موضوعاتی حاضر به مذاکره است و تاکید کرد توافق اولیه لزوما نیازمند جزئیات کامل نخواهد بود.

او به خبرنگاران گفت: «لازم نیست متن توافق از ابتدا نوشته شده باشد، اما باید یک راه‌حل دیپلماتیک وجود داشته باشد که به‌طور شفاف موضوعات قابل مذاکره و میزان امتیازاتی را که ایران در آغاز حاضر به ارائه آن است، مشخص کند.»

روبیو در ادامه با تردید نسبت به موضع تهران درباره برنامه هسته‌ای گفت ایران «همیشه گفته سلاح هسته‌ای نمی‌خواهد، اما این را جدی نمی‌گوید» و تاکید کرد اقداماتی مانند توسعه موشک‌های دوربرد و ایجاد تاسیسات زیرزمینی غنی‌سازی با چنین ادعایی همخوانی ندارد.

وزیر خارجه آمریکا در عین حال افزود ایران اکنون این فرصت را دارد که «به‌طور شفاف» نشان دهد به دنبال سلاح هسته‌ای نیست.
@VahidOOnLine

📡 @VahidOnline

extra.original_body:
مارکو روبیو، وزیر خارجه آمریکا در بخش دیگری از نشست خبری خود درباره مردم ایران گفت: «فکر می‌کنم رئیس‌جمهور ترامپ معتقد است که وضعیت مردم ایران زیر این رژیم واقعاً دلخراش است. من قبلاً هم گفتم کشوری را نمی‌شناسم که در آن فاصله و شکاف بین مردم و کسانی که کشور را اداره می‌کنند به این اندازه زیاد باشد.»

او افزود: «این کشور توسط روحانیون رادیکال شیعه اداره می‌شود، و این تصویر واقعی مردم ایران نیست. مردم ایران شاید شیعه باشند، اما رادیکال نیستند و روحانی هم نیستند. آن‌ها فقط یک زندگی عادی و طبیعی می‌خواهند؛ در بسیاری جهات کشوری بسیار مدرن با تاریخ و میراث فوق‌العاده.»

وزیر خارجه آمریکا تاکید کرد: «مردم ایران هر روز قربانی این رژیم هستند. و رئیس‌جمهور نسبت به آنچه بر سر آن‌ها می‌آید همدلی عمیقی دارد.»
@VahidOOnLine 
مارکو روبیو، وزیر امور خارجه آمریکا در پاسخ به سوالی درباره اظهارات دونالد ترام

title: ⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸Times of Israel: The U.S.-led “Board of Peace” warned that Israel will no longer be expected to fully adhere to the Gaza ceasefire terms if Hamas refuses a proposed disarmament framework. The...
body:
⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸Times of Israel: The U.S.-led “Board of Peace” warned that Israel will no longer be expected to fully adhere to the Gaza ceasefire terms if Hamas refuses a proposed disarmament framework.

The proposal included gradual Hamas disarmament, dismantling tunnels, and surrendering heavy weapons in exchange for reconstruction and postwar governance arrangements in Gaza.

Hamas rejected the offer, insisting Israel first implement previous ceasefire commitments including withdrawals, humanitarian aid expansion, and prisoners release. 

@wfwitness

title: Open Source Intel MT CS Anthem has been identified as the second of the two U.S.-flagged ships escorted through the Strait of Hormuz on May 4, marking the first convoy under Project Freedom. MT CS ...
body:
Open Source Intel
MT CS Anthem has been identified as the second of the two U.S.-flagged ships escorted through the Strait of Hormuz on May 4, marking the first convoy under Project Freedom.

MT CS Anthem is a U.S.-flagged medium-range tanker (IMO 9785691), operated by Crowley Stena Marine Solutions, a joint venture between Crowley Maritime and Stena Bulk. 

The vessel is part of the U.S. Tanker Security Program.

The IRGC watched this ship sail through and decided it was a bad idea to attack.

title: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio: Operation "Epic Fury" has ended - President Trump announced this to Congress. Now we're at the "Liberty Project" stage, and negotiations on the nuclear issue. ## ...
body:
US Secretary of State Marco Rubio:

Operation "Epic Fury" has ended - President Trump announced this to Congress.

Now we're at the "Liberty Project" stage, and negotiations on the nuclear issue.

##

Explanation: By declaring the end of Operation "Epic Fury," the Trump administration avoided the need to obtain Congressional approval for a military operation lasting more than 60 days.

Now - if necessary, a new operation will be launched, or any further military action will be part of the "Liberty Project," whose stated goal is to "defensively" release the ship bottleneck in Hormuz.

To comment, follow this link

title: The German Foreign Minister (during Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar's visit to Germany): Germany is committed to Israel's security – a steadfast commitment that is not subject to change. Let it alway...
body:
The German Foreign Minister (during Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar's visit to Germany):

Germany is committed to Israel's security – a steadfast commitment that is not subject to change.

Let it always be clear: we will not allow any threat to the very existence of the State of Israel.

This is a fundamental principle of Germany's policy.

body:
🇺🇦🕊️ UKRAINIAN MEDIA: "THE SILENCE REGIME STARTED"

 Ukraine will continue the ceasefire regime if Russia also observes the silence.  Kirill Budanov stated that the next step is up to Moscow:

"The truce introduced by Ukraine testifies to a genuine desire for peace on our part. Not tied to any dates for the sake of imposing ideological dogmas, but for the sake of preserving human life and restoring security." 
"If the ceasefire announced by the President is mutual, we will continue it. And this will give us, albeit small, hope for establishing a lasting peace, "
🐻Will the first Ukrainian "silent" drones hit Russia in more or less than 6 hours?

title: ☠️ Epstein Fury is OVER — Freedumb Project takes the stage Narco Rubio announced the latest rebrand of US-Israeli military aggression against Iran — now with a “Freedom” logo slapped on it. 💬 “We’r...
body:
☠️ Epstein Fury is OVER — Freedumb Project takes the stage

Narco Rubio announced the latest rebrand of US-Israeli military aggression against Iran — now with a “Freedom” logo slapped on it.

💬 “We’re done with that stage of it. We’re now on to this Project Freedom,” Rubio said.

💀 The goal is to avoid congressional oversight — the very oversight that was supposed to prevent Trump from waging an illegal war of aggression after the initial 60 days had passed, but didn’t, as usual.

title: Israel has appointed a settler and close ally of far-right minister Bezalel Smotrich as head of the Israel Land Authority, the government body responsible for allocating and managing state land, as...
body:
Israel has appointed a settler and close ally of far-right minister Bezalel Smotrich as head of the Israel Land Authority, the government body responsible for allocating and managing state land, as well as illegal settlements in the occupied West Bank.

Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu approved the appointment of Yehuda Eliyahu on Monday.

Eliyahu previously headed the Settlement Administration within the defence ministry, where he oversaw the largest Israeli land grab in the West Bank in recent memory.

His selection was approved last week by a public appointments committee, though not unanimously.

The committee’s legal adviser opposed the move, arguing that Eliyahu’s decades-long personal relationship with Smotrich posed a conflict of interest.

✍️ MEE/ Nadav Rapaport in Tel Aviv, Isra

title: OSINTdefender RT @laraseligman: It is FALSE that: -two tankers were shot at or crashed -a search and rescue team was sent -all tankers are grounded The tankers may have squawked but that doesn’t me...
body:
OSINTdefender
RT @laraseligman: It is FALSE that:
-two tankers were shot at or crashed
-a search and rescue team was sent
-all tankers are grounded

The tankers may have squawked but that doesn’t mean they crashed.

Which part?

-There is publicly visible data showing the tankers squawked 7700 emergency this morning.

-After which no other tankers were in the sky, or at least broadcasting.

-OSINT sources have shown satellite data, that S&R crews who were on tarmac were no longer there after this took place

-Flight data shows no other tankers in the sky the rest of the day which is an anomaly. 

Could I see that they are denying a crash/hit and have another explanation? Sure - and I'd be happy to hear it.

Is it reasonable for them to deny it all? No.

Not unless they are suggesting an ad
